user.title: Connect to VerdiGrow
user.description: Enter your VerdiGrow URL and API token (Garden Setup shows the token / set API_TOKEN).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach VerdiGrow at that URL.

abort.already_configured: This VerdiGrow instance is already configured.

add_mapping.title: Map an HA sensor to VerdiGrow
add_mapping.description: Pick an HA sensor, one or more VerdiGrow containers/areas it measures, and which metric it is.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach VerdiGrow to load containers/areas.
abort.no_mappings: There are no mappings to remove yet.
